response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Vocal performances for 'Kireigoto' and 'Moonlight' phonetically align with the reference lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized song lyrics from the reference; manual transcription and translation performed for the 2-minute interlude talk. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are precisely anchored to vocal onsets. Song subtitles use aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions to keep pace with the music, while dialogue blocks are segmented for semantic flow. Visual title cards are included as per triggers.

subtitles.original: 綺麗事
subtitles.english: [Title: Kireigoto]

subtitles.original: 本音も言えない日常にはただ
subtitles.english: In a daily life where I can't even say my true feelings

subtitles.original: 「理想なんて」と嘲け笑う声
subtitles.english: Just voices mocking "ideals"

subtitles.original: 言い返す言葉も選べずに
subtitles.english: Without even being able to choose words to retort

subtitles.original: ただ増していく痛み
subtitles.english: The pain just keeps increasing

subtitles.original: 虚勢を張る衝動で隠して
subtitles.english: Hiding it with the impulse to bluster

subtitles.original: 綺麗なままで生きてたいのか
subtitles.english: Do you want to keep living while being beautiful?

subtitles.original: 諦めを塗り重ねて
subtitles.english: Painting over the resignation

subtitles.original: 「本当」が見えなくなってしまうんだ
subtitles.english: The "truth" disappears

subtitles.original: 綺麗事を吐くその口が
subtitles.english: The mouth that speaks of pretty things

subtitles.original: 綺麗事を吐くその口が(ah)
subtitles.english: The mouth that speaks of pretty things (ah)

subtitles.original: 綺麗事を吐くその口が
subtitles.english: The mouth that speaks of pretty things

subtitles.original: 嫌いだから歌を歌うんだ
subtitles.english: I hate it, that's why I sing

subtitles.original: 諦めているその顔が
subtitles.english: That resigned face of yours

subtitles.original: 君の事を苦しめる
subtitles.english: Makes you suffer

subtitles.original: こんな声だって伝わらなくて
subtitles.english: Even these voices can't be conveyed

subtitles.original: もっと完璧な言葉を紡ぎたくて
subtitles.english: I want to weave even more perfect words

subtitles.original: ずっと欲張ってきっと間違えて
subtitles.english: Always greedy, surely making mistakes

subtitles.original: それでも歌おう
subtitles.english: Still, let's sing

subtitles.original: 不完全だから
subtitles.english: Because I'm incomplete

subtitles.original: ありがとうございました
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: 楽しんでますか？
subtitles.english: Are you enjoying yourselves?

subtitles.original: さあ、みんなね、武道館「再演」で出したあの重大発表のティザー
subtitles.english: So, everyone, that major announcement teaser we showed at the Budokan "SAIEN"...

subtitles.original: あの内容が気になっている頃なのではないでしょうか？
subtitles.english: ...you must be wondering about what it's all about by now, right?

subtitles.original: それから、みんなもちろん見つけてくれましたよね？
subtitles.english: And of course, you all found it, didn't you?

subtitles.original: 先週の月曜日から、ある場所で屋外広告もね、出ていたりして
subtitles.english: Since last Monday, outdoor advertisements have been appearing in certain places...

subtitles.original: きっと今頃「何が起きるんだ」って、ただならぬ空気を見なさん感じて
subtitles.english: ...by now, I'm sure you're all feeling a strange atmosphere, wondering "What's going to happen?"...

subtitles.original: どぎまぎしているんじゃないかなと思うんですけれども
subtitles.english: ...and feeling a bit flustered.

subtitles.original: まずはね、言葉じゃなくて、今日の告知に向けて
subtitles.english: But first, instead of words, heading towards today's announcement...

subtitles.original: 音楽に込めてみんなに伝えたいなと思い、こういう編成で今回やらせてもらっております
subtitles.english: ...I wanted to convey it through music, so we're performing with this setup today.

subtitles.original: アコースティックってさ、なんかエモくて
subtitles.english: Acoustic music, you know, it's kind of "emo"...

subtitles.original: 今までのことをこう思い返すような、なんかノスタルジックな気持ちになったりしますよね
subtitles.english: ...it makes you feel nostalgic, like you're looking back on everything that's happened.

subtitles.original: いつもはテンションを上げてくれるあの曲が
subtitles.english: Those songs that usually pump you up...

subtitles.original: 今日はまた違った形でみんなに響いたらいいなと思って歌わせていただいております
subtitles.english: ...I'm singing them today hoping they'll resonate with you in a different way.

subtitles.original: 楽曲のアレンジもそうだし、この生誕配信自体もそうだし
subtitles.english: Whether it's the song arrangements or this birthday stream itself...

subtitles.original: 新しい一面を見せながらも、何よりこの8年間みんなで一緒にやってきた
subtitles.english: ...while showing a new side of myself, more than anything, these past 8 years we've spent together...

subtitles.original: 紡いできた絆みたいなものがしっかり感じられるライブにできたら嬉しいです
subtitles.english: ...I hope to make this a live where you can really feel the bond we've woven.

subtitles.original: それでは次の曲に行きましょう
subtitles.english: Now then, let's move on to the next song.

subtitles.original: ムーンライト
subtitles.english: Moonlight.

subtitles.original: ムーンライト
subtitles.english: [Title: Moonlight]

subtitles.original: 遠くまで歩こうよ、裸足で
subtitles.english: Let's walk far, barefoot

subtitles.original: 小さな幸せを見つけて
subtitles.english: Find small happiness

subtitles.original: 湿った月が窓を覗いて
subtitles.english: A wet moon peeks into the window

subtitles.original: こっちへおいでと笑った
subtitles.english: And laughed at me, saying "come here"

subtitles.original: 似たもの同士なんだよね、案外
subtitles.english: We are similar people, surprisingly

subtitles.original: 分かり合えない部分も安牌
subtitles.english: Unspoken parts are also safe bets

subtitles.original: 月明かりをめくった残像
subtitles.english: An afterglow after flipping through moonlight

subtitles.original: 誰かにとっての普通をしよう
subtitles.english: Let's do what's normal for someone

subtitles.original: 私と踊ってよ、ムーンライト
subtitles.english: Dance with me, Moonlight

subtitles.original: ねえ、こっちであそぼう サニーサイド
subtitles.english: Hey, let's play here, Sunny Side

subtitles.original: 隠し事ばっかのインサイド
subtitles.english: Inside, full of secrets

subtitles.original: ねえ、こっちであそぼうよ ミッドナイト
subtitles.english: Hey, let's play here, Midnight
